Document:
# IPCs
[color=#ffa500]Warning! This species is not recommended for new players due to major gameplay changes![/color]
IPC (Placeholder text)
## Racial Features
- Receive [color=#8147ff]50% more shock damage[/color], [color=#FF3636]20% more blunt damage[/color] and [color=#B9BF93]30% less slash/piercing damage[/color]. - Deal [color=red]6[/color] blunt damage with your mighty fists of steel! - You don't need to eat or drink, but you do need to stay charged. You can take power directly from APCs or sit in a borg recharger- both work. - You're functionally immune to spacing, as temperature doesn't effect you and you don't need to breathe.. You will still overheat in a vaccum, though. - Play music with your in-built MIDI synthesiser! - Chemicals don't work on you, and your "doctor" is a roboticist. Welding heals physical injuries, cables fix electrical damage, glass fixes your eyes, plasma fixes radiation and Oil packs restore your "blood". - EMPs are [color=red]lethal[/color] to you! Don't let yourself get hit, or you'll run out of power and require manual rebooting. - Internal Headset! It has two slots. Choose wisely!
Helpful tip - You need to unlock your panel and then use a screwdriver to get access to your internals, this includes the comm keys! Once open, right click yourself and go to "Eject" - You'll then pull out the last key you put in.
